rationale: Commit decision. Steward helios:steward:registry-governance reviews the proposal and the reviewer's evidence-attestation (urn:helios:evidence:review-redacted:...). The reviewer evidence includes one redacted-content entry per helios:redaction-policy:v1; the steward weighs it by evidenceId without surfacing redacted fields. The proposer's criterion-attestation evidence (urn:helios:evidence:proposal-criterion:...) supports the proposal's claim to satisfy the attached criteria. Decision: commit. The lifecycle transition draft->active is recorded in a separate transition request and event; this audit-record captures the commit decision itself, immediately preceding the transition. Redacted content is not copied into this rationale per helios:profile:privacy-tier:v1.
